worth_reading.title: Muse Spark 1.1 is now available on AI Gateway
worth_reading.author: Vercel AI
worth_reading.summary: Muse Spark 1.1 from Meta is now available on AI Gateway . It is a multimodal reasoning model with a 1M token context window built for agentic tasks, accepting text, image, video, PDF, and audio inputs. Muse Spark 1.1 plans and orchestrates work across tools and services, operating as a main agent or as a subagent, and it works with new tools, MCP servers, and custom skills without examples. The model supports parallel tool calling, structured output, and built-in search with
worth_reading.excerpt: Muse Spark 1.1 from Meta is now available on AI Gateway . The model supports parallel tool calling, structured output, and built-in search with

signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: GPT 5.6 is now available on AI Gateway in three models: Sol, Terra, and Luna. GPT 5.6 from OpenAI is now available on AI Gateway in a limited preview, across three models: Sol, Terra, and Luna. signal_watch.author: GitHub Copilot
signal_watch.summary: GitHub had over 14,000 repositories. Fewer than half had clear ownership. clusters.title: Muse Spark 1.1 is now available on AI Gateway
clusters.summary: Muse Spark 1.1 from Meta is now available on AI Gateway . It is a multimodal reasoning model with a 1M token context window built for agentic tasks, accepting text, image, video, PDF, and audio inputs. Muse Spark 1.1 plans and orchestrates work across tools and services, operating as a main agent or as a subagent, and it works with new tools, MCP servers, and custom skills without examples. The model supports parallel tool calling, structured output, and built-in search with

clusters.title: GPT 5.6 Sol, Luna, and Terra now available on AI Gateway
clusters.summary: GPT 5.6 is now available on AI Gateway in three models: Sol, Terra, and Luna. GPT 5.6 from OpenAI is now available on AI Gateway in a limited preview, across three models: Sol, Terra, and Luna. All three are stronger at agentic work across coding, biology, and cybersecurity, and are more token-efficient than the previous generation. Sol ( openai/gpt-5.6-sol ): the flagship, and the most capable of the three. Terra ( openai/gpt-5.6-terra ): a balanced model for everyday work,

clusters.title: How GitHub gave every repository a durable owner
clusters.summary: GitHub had over 14,000 repositories. Fewer than half had clear ownership. Here's how we gave every active repository a validated owner in under 45 days, archived the rest, and made ownership the foundation for everything that followed. The post How GitHub gave every repository a durable owner appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
